mapper.sql: id, dict_id, detail_value, detail_label, description, sort, status, is_default
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_dict_detail_info WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
SELECT FROM sys_dict_detail_info WHERE dict_id = #{dictId} AND delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dict_detail_info SET detail_value = #{detailValue}, detail_label = #{detailLabel}, description = #{description}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status}, is_default = #{isDefault}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
